作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7551381197197151294","book_info":{"abstract":"作为国防科技大学的尖子生。
刚刚觉醒大忽悠系统的赵辰，就被局座邀请加入了战忽局。
正好，战忽局的工作就是忽悠，死的说成活的，黑的说成白的。
而赵辰的大忽悠系统，只要不断忽悠就能获得奖励。
从此，赵辰在忽悠的道路上一发不可收拾！
央妈军事频道的采访上，赵辰大手一挥。
目前我们和老美的军事差距还很大，越是这个时候越要学会梭哈。
梭哈是一种智慧，我们投资五千亿没到研发机甲。
我们投资两万亿美刀研发第七代战斗机！
我们投资五万亿研发南天门神秘计划！
全世界都被赵辰的忽悠给带的跑偏了。
越是忽悠，赵辰获得的奖励也就越多。
从此，赵辰在大忽悠的道路上是越走越远！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/96b50168e99582c2ba4da1ceebdb92df","author":"辽北狠人范德彪","author_id":"","book_id":"7551381197197151294","book_name":"这叫模型？一炮干穿航母","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#102840","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":854,"name":"黑科技","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=854&name=黑科技&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7551409614718241816","read_count":"11389","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1702065"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.4","serial_count":"820","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,穿越,直播,黑科技","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/6bd028b06638d979b7f02db52f7c8fb6~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779320426&x-signature=%2FRxJbtGADCz5jolDNQjXWRqCdUo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"146"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322074026D7ED14EDEE554376E7EE"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":11137,"
